title: Infosys McCamish Resolves Oregon Data Breach Matter Through Assurance of Voluntary Compliance
detailed_summary: Infosys disclosed that Infosys McCamish Systems, a subsidiary of Infosys BPM limited, entered into an Assurance of Voluntary Compliance with the State of Oregon Attorney General's Office on August 5, 2025. The matter relates to concerns that IMS may have violated the Oregon Consumer Information Protection Act and Oregon Unlawful Trade Practices Act in connection with a 2023 data breach, specifically around allegedly insufficient notice. The AVC resolves the matter without any admission or finding of violation by IMS. IMS will pay $225,000 dollars to the Oregon Attorney General's Office, due within thirty business days of execution of the AVC and receipt of payment instructions.
